title: Part Feeding Wizard Calibration
description:
Part Feeding Wizard Calibration

Feeder Calibration

This screen is used to configure feeder calibration.

Item	Description

Copy calibration from another part	Optional.  Copies calibration results
		 from another part to the part selected. Use this feature if the
		 new part is similar to a previously calibrated part.

Part	Specify the part to copy calibration
		 results from.

Copy	Copy calibration results.

Click the [Finish] button to proceed.
